# Radix Converter – Copilot Instructions

- This is a React + Vite project.
- The app converts numbers between different bases: decimal, hexadecimal, binary, and octal.
- Main component: `src/App.jsx`
- Styling: `src/App.css` and `src/index.css`
- Node.js must be installed to run this project.
